html:
The Orange Gem is an item used to craft two Ancient items in Don't Starve. It can be used to craft The Lazy Forager, which automatically collects items, and The Lazy Explorer, which teleports the player a short distance across the screen. 

Orange Gems are obtained by mining Ancient Statues, destroying Broken Clockworks, breaking certain Relics, opening Ornate Chests, and Hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Stations in the Ruins.

Nutrition Facts

Critter Produces Notes
Orange Gems have a mineral value of 5.
Loyalty (When hand-fed) Adds 3 minutes (6 day segments) of Follower time, with questionable efficiency.
Nothing! Though it does delay their starvation.

Downloadable Content

In the Don't Starve: Reign of Giants DLC, Orange Gems have a 0.02% chance to be dropped by Tumbleweeds, making them a renewable resource. In Shipwrecked, Orange Gems can be found in buried X Marks the Spot treasure chests while in Hamlet, there is a very low chance for Orange Gems to drop from hammering A Smashing Pot.

Usage

×3

×2

×2

×2

Trivia

  • The Orange Gem's element appears to be sloth; its opposite being the Green Gem.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

"orangegem"
“It's an orange gem.”
–Wilson
“This one makes my fingers tingle.”
–Willow
“Pretty rock.”
–Wolfgang
“Such things used to bring me happiness.”
–Wendy
“IT SHIMMERS IN MY HANDS.”
–WX-78
“It looks like a Spessartite garnet.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's shimmering.”
–Woodie
“This will be quite powerful with some fuel.”
–Maxwell
“Curious, prismatic shapes such as this never occur naturally.”
–Wagstaff
“A stöne öf örange.”
–Wigfrid
“Orange you glad we found you, gem?”
–Webber
“The world looks fractured when I peer through it!”
–Walani
“I miss oranges...”
–Warly
“Woodlegs loves all th'gems!”
–Woodlegs
“YON GEM COULD SAVETH WILBA TIME”
–Wilba
“Helper Shiny”
–Wormwood
“Orange you glad it wasn't a banana?”
–Wheeler
The Orange Gem is an item used to craft two Ancient items in Don't Starve. It can be used to craft The Lazy Forager, which automatically collects items, and The Lazy Explorer, which teleports the player a short distance across the screen.
Orange Gems are obtained by mining Ancient Statues, destroying Broken Clockworks, breaking certain Relics, opening Ornate Chests, and Hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Stations in the Ruins.
